_comment: Sample SNS event for testing the Lambda dispatcher via the AWS Console Test tab.
Simulates an SES inbound email receipt notification.
SES inbound email flow:
Customer sends email to support@clawboutique.com
-> SES receipt rule (ClawBoutiqueSupportInbound) triggers
-> SES stores the raw email in S3 (claw-boutique-ses-inbox / emails/<messageId>)
-> SES publishes a receipt notification to SNS (ClawBoutiqueInbound)
-> SNS invokes the Lambda dispatcher
-> Dispatcher calls POST /inbound/email on the OpenClaw gateway
How to use:
1. Open the Lambda function ClawBoutiqueDispatcher in the AWS Console.
2. Click 'Test' -> 'Create new event'.
3. Paste this entire JSON object as the test event body.
4. Click 'Test' and inspect the CloudWatch log output.
Notes:
- The 'body' field in the gateway payload will be null here because 'content'
is null in the SES notification (email was stored in S3, not inlined).
- For emails under 150 KB, SES can include the raw MIME body inline;
set 'content' to the base64-encoded raw email to test that path.
- The s3 object reference (bucket + key) lets the OpenClaw gateway
fetch the full email body from S3 when needed.

Sns.Message: {"notificationType":"Received","mail":{"source":"maria.santos@gmail.com","destination":["support@clawboutique.com"],"messageId":"ses-msg-id-abc123def456","commonHeaders":{"from":["Maria Santos <maria.santos@gmail.com>"],"to":["support@clawboutique.com"],"subject":"Question about my order #ORD-2024-0601","date":"Sat, 01 Jun 2024 12:05:00 +0000","messageId":"<ses-msg-id-abc123def456@mail.gmail.com>"},"headers":[{"name":"Return-Path","value":"<maria.santos@gmail.com>"},{"name":"Received","value":"from mail.gmail.com (mail.gmail.com [209.85.220.41]) by inbound-smtp.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com with SMTP id ses-msg-id-abc123def456"},{"name":"MIME-Version","value":"1.0"},{"name":"Content-Type","value":"text/plain; charset=UTF-8"},{"name":"Content-Transfer-Encoding","value":"quoted-printable"}],"timestamp":"2024-06-01T12:05:00.000Z"},"receipt":{"timestamp":"2024-06-01T12:05:01.000Z","processingTimeMillis":234,"recipients":["support@clawboutique.com"],"spamVerdict":{"status":"PASS"},"virusVerdict":{"status":"PASS"},"spfVerdict":{"status":"PASS"},"dkimVerdict":{"status":"PASS"},"dmarcVerdict":{"status":"PASS"},"action":{"type":"SNS","topicArn":"arn:aws:sns:ap-southeast-1:123456789012:ClawBoutiqueInbound","bucketName":"claw-boutique-ses-inbox","objectKey":"emails/ses-msg-id-abc123def456","encoding":"UTF8"}},"content":null}
Sns.Subject: Amazon SES Email Receipt Notification
